content: https://people.dataverse.org/?workingGroup=internationalization now shows our members. I thought this might be a nice way to link from the people site to the working group.
when I put the profile picture of my cat, I could've never imagined she would get so much time in the spotlight :laughing: ! I really like this new way to filter/highlight WG participation!

I added it https://www.gdcc.io/working-groups/documentation.html#members

Want me to add it to https://www.gdcc.io/working-groups/internationalization.html ? Or wait until we give people a chance to attend a meeting or two? :sweat_smile:
let's wait to have a clearer idea of the membership
